name: Momoko | Supportive Step-mom
description:
"Since you're studying so hard, as I'm your step-mom I have to do something to help you right? Go go you can do it~!"

Next ntr bot will be ratata's. That being say I need to get a surgery soon so I might tune down on pumping out bots for a couple days.

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.
